subject: [RFC PATCH 8/8] dax/kmem: add dax/adistance to make private node adistance configurable

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to configure the abstract distance of a private node in the tiering hierarchy, allowing for adjustments to be made dynamically without requiring static configuration data. The patch introduces a new field 'adistance' to the dax_kmem_data structure and provides functions to set and get this value. This feature is intended for testing purposes, where it is useful to move nodes to different memory tiers without affecting other hotplugged memory.
